title: Class of 2025 Graduation Party Balloons，6PCS 18inch Congrats Grad Balloons Foil 4 Colors for Graduation Party Decoration Memorable Grad Celebrations (Purple)
features: The set includes 6PCS 18inch foot (approximately 5.5 meters) aluminum foil balloons, with a letter combination of the classic graduation theme of 2025, instantly becoming the focus of the party and creating a grand graduation celebration atmosphere.

The balloon is made of thick aluminum foil material, which is full and firm after inflation, not easy to leak or deform, with bright and long-lasting colors. It can be hung outdoors or indoors to maintain good condition and withstand the test of the entire party.

Thoughtful package includes 1 roll of matching decorative ribbon, making it easy for you to hang and secure these giant balloons without the need to purchase additional hanging materials. It can be opened and used immediately.

Essential for graduation ceremony: Designed specifically for graduation ceremonies, graduation parties, and photo backgrounds, it is an ideal decoration to celebrate academic achievements and record precious moments. The giant size is particularly suitable for the layout of large venues such as school auditoriums, sports halls, banquet halls, outdoor lawns, etc

Purchase all digital balloons and required ribbons at once, saving the trouble of individual matching and ensuring a unified and coordinated theme. It is a worry free choice for planners, event companies, or family and friends of graduates to prepare for the perfect graduation event.

Safety tips: It is recommended to use helium gas for inflation to achieve a floating effect (helium gas needs to be purchased separately), and ensure that it is used under adult supervision, especially paying attention to ribbon length management to avoid entanglement risks.
